input.command:
kubectl get statefulset mongodb-replica -n mongodb -o json | python3 -c "
import json, sys

sts = json.load(sys.stdin)
spec = sts['spec']['template']['spec']

# Add mongod-config volume
volumes = spec.get('volumes', [])
# Remove if already exists
volumes = [v for v in volumes if v['name'] != 'mongod-config']
volumes.append({
    'name': 'mongod-config',
    'configMap': {'name': 'mongod-config'}
})
spec['volumes'] = volumes

# Add volumeMount to mongod container
containers = spec['containers']
for c in containers:
    if c['name'] == 'mongod':
        mounts = c.get('volumeMounts', [])
        mounts = [m for m in mounts if m['mountPath'] != '/etc/mongod']
        mounts.append({
            'mountPath': '/etc/mongod',
            'name': 'mongod-config',
            'readOnly': True
        })
        c['volumeMounts'] = mounts

        # Add --config to command if not already there
        cmd = c.get('command', [])
        if '--config' not in cmd:
            cmd.append('--config')
            cmd.append('/etc/mongod/mongod.conf')
        c['command'] = cmd
        break

print(json.dumps(sts, indent=2))
" > /tmp/sts-updated.json 2>&1 && echo "JSON generated OK" || echo "FAILED"

# Monitor rolling restart progress while waiting
for attempt in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 5
  STATUS=$(kubectl get pods -n mongodb --no-headers 2>&1)
  echo "[$attempt] $(date -u +%H:%M:%S) $STATUS"
  READY=$(echo "$STATUS" | grep -c "1/1")
  if [ "$READY" -eq 3 ]; then
    ROLLOUT=$(kubectl rollout status statefulset/mongodb-replica -n mongodb --timeout=5s 2>&1)
    if echo "$ROLLOUT" | grep -q "successfully rolled out"; then
      echo "Rolling update complete!"
      break
    fi
  fi
done
